title: Klar
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Klar |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Starfighter Corps (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Starfighter Corps]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Tell me, Captain, you've been dealing closely with the ''Admonitor''{{'s}} TIE pilots for the past few days. Is there anyone in particular you'd consider especially good under fire?''"
"''Lieutenant Klar's very good. Excellent pilot, very cool.|[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dagon Niriz]]|{{JournalCite|11|Command Decision}}}} '''Klar''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] and a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] pilot during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He served aboard the ''[[Admonitor]]'', a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] under the command of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. Assigned to map the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], the ship came across a craft belonging to the [[Ebruchi]]. Klar, after being recommended by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dagon Niriz]] as especially calm under fire, was sent to the command ship of [[Creysis]], an Ebruchi leader, ostensibly as a TIE fighter escort for the [[Council of Colonists]]. In fact, Creysis intended to take them hostage. Knowing this, Thrawn had Klar's TIE fighter stripped of most of its advanced technology in order to deceive the Ebruchi as to the technological level of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In on Thrawn's plan, Klar allowed his TIE to fall behind when the escort was attacked. It was disabled and he was captured. In the hands of the Ebruchi, Klar remained calm under interrogation until, his plans in place, Thrawn issued the order for a squad of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to blast their way out of hiding places on the [[Zeta-class long-range shuttle|Zeta-class shuttle]] and rescue the prisoners. Klar was safely returned to the ''Admonitor''. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|11|Command Decision|reprint=1}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Navy pilots of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]]
